hypothesis: If metal lattice candidates are screened using a chemical-template-informed machine learning model that prioritizes strong electron localization at interstitial quasi-atom sites, then the selected candidates will be thermodynamically stable metal superhydrides and those with 3D electronic connectivity, high hydrogen content, and large hydrogen-derived density of states at the Fermi level will exhibit strong electron-phonon coupling and high superconducting transition temperatures as validated by DFT.
